# Route N109
> Authorized Mondraker Dealer, Premium Performance Bike Store and Specialized Repair Workshop in Lavos, Figueira da Foz, Figueira da Foz, Portugal. Established over 35 years.

## Site Structure
- [Início / Home (PT)](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/): Main page highlighting official Mondraker partnership, services, and featured popular E-MTB and Conventional bikes.
- [Catálogo / Catalog (PT)](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/catalogo): Browse the complete range of Mondraker high-performance bikes including Zendit (DJI Avinox) and Crafty series.
- [Serviços / Services (PT)](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/servicos): Detailed information on official workshop repair services, custom builds, and budget requests.
- [Empresa / About (PT)](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/empresa): Over 35 years of history, official partnership with Mondraker, and contact coordinates.
- [Galeria / Gallery (PT)](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/galeria): Visual gallery of our shop, mechanics workshop, custom builds, and team rides.

## International Versions
- [English Home](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/en)
- [Español Inicio](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/es)
- [Français Accueil](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/fr)
- [Deutsch Startseite](https://agostinho-bikes.vercel.app/de)

## Key Facts & Specifications
- Over 35 years of experience in specialized cycle sales and maintenance.
- Official dealership and certified technical center for Mondraker Performance Bikes.
- Official service and diagnostic center for DJI Avinox and Bosch Smart System e-bike motors.
- Premium custom bike builds and professional tuning services.
- Official email: routen109mobilidade@gmail.com
- Contact phone: +351 935 141 143
